items.title: Gaming (Amendment) Act 1973 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to extend section 40 of the Gaming Act 1968 to gaming at clubs other than members' clubs, and to amend the provisions of that section relating to the sums which may be charged for taking part in gaming.

items.title: Supply of Goods (Implied Terms) Act 1973
items.description: An Act to amend the law with respect to the terms to be implied in contracts of sale of goods and hire-purchase agreements and on the exchange of goods for trading stamps, and with respect to the terms of conditional sale agreements; and for connected purposes.

items.title: Costs in Criminal Cases Act 1973
Administration of Justice Act 1973
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to justices of the peace and to make further provision with respect to the administration of justice and matters connected therewith.

items.title: Education Act 1973
items.description: An Act to make provision for terminating and in part replacing the powers possessed by the Secretary of State for Education and Science and the Secretary of State for Wales under the Charities Act 1960 concurrently with the Charity Commissioners or under the Endowed Schools Acts 1869 to 1948, and enlarging certain other powers of modifying educational trusts, and for supplementing awards under section 1 and restricting awards under section 2 of the Education Act 1962, and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Northern Ireland Assembly Act 1973 (repealed 2.12.1999)
items.description: An Act to establish a Northern Ireland Assembly and to provide for election to that Assembly.

items.title: Matrimonial Causes Act 1973
items.description: An Act to consolidate certain enactments relating to matrimonial proceedings, maintenance agreements, and declarations of legitimacy, validity of marriage and British nationality, with amendments to give effect to recommendations of the Law Commission.

items.title: Independent Broadcasting Authority Act 1973
National Theatre and Museum of London Act 1973
London Cab Act 1973 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the London Cab Act 1968.

items.title: Overseas Pensions Act 1973
items.description: An Act to amend the Medway Ports Reorganisation Scheme, 1968; to confer further powers on the Medway Ports Authority; and for other purposes.

items.title: Law Reform (Diligence) (Scotland) Act 1973
Education (Work Experience) Act 1973 (repealed 1.11.1996)
items.description: An Act to enable education authorities to arrange for children under school-leaving age to have work experience, as part of their education.

items.title: Employment of Children Act 1973 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make further provision with respect to restrictions on the employment of persons under the upper limit of school age and to the means of imposing and enforcing such restrictions; and for connected purposes.

items.title: Succession (Scotland) Act 1973
items.description: An Act to increase the amounts of the sums payable to a surviving spouse under sections 8 and 9 of the Succession (Scotland) Act 1964 and to empower the Secretary of State by order further to increase such amounts.

items.title: Land Compensation Act 1973
items.description: An Act to confer a new right to compensation for depreciation of the value of interests in land caused by the use of highways, aerodromes and other public works; to confer powers for mitigating the injurious effect of such works on their surroundings; to make new provision for the benefit of persons displaced from land by public authorities; to amend the law relating to compulsory purchase and planning blight; to amend section 35 of the Roads (Scotland) Act 1970; and for purposes connected with those matters.

items.title: Bahamas Independence Act 1973
items.description: An Act to make provision for, and in connection with, the attainment by the Bahamas of fully responsible status within the Commonwealth.

items.title: Rate Rebate Act 1973
Guardianship Act 1973 (repealed 1.11.1996)
items.description: An Act to amend the law of England and Wales as to the guardianship of minors so as to make the rights of a mother equal with those of a father, and so as to make further provision with respect to applications and orders under section 9 of the Guardianship of Minors Act 1971 and with respect to the powers of a guardian under that Act in relation to the minor's property, and to amend section 4(2) of the Matrimonial Proceedings (Magistrates' Courts) Act 1960; to make provision in relation to like matters for Scotland; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: Sea Fish Industry Act 1973
Sea Fisheries (Shellfish) Act 1973
items.description: An Act to amend the Sea Fisheries (Shellfish) Act 1967.

items.title: Dentists (Amendment) Act 1973
National Health Service Reorganisation Act 1973 (repealed 28.6.1995)
items.description: An Act to make further provision with respect to the national health service in England and Wales and amendments of the enactments relating to the national health service in Scotland; and for purposes connected with those matters.

items.title: Protection of Wrecks Act 1973
items.description: An Act to secure the protection of wrecks in territorial waters and the sites of such wrecks, from interference by unauthorised persons; and for connected purposes.

items.title: Ulster Defence Regiment Act 1973
Employment Agencies Act 1973
items.description: An Act to regulate employment agencies and businesses; and for connected purposes.

items.title: Northern Ireland Constitution Act 1973
items.description: An Act to make new provision for the government of Northern Ireland.

items.title: Water Act 1973
items.description: An Act to make provision for a national policy for water, for the conferring and discharge of functions as to water (including sewerage and sewage disposal, fisheries and land drainage) and as to recreation and amenity in connection with water, for the making of charges by water authorities and other statutory water undertakers, and for connected purposes.

items.title: Social Security Act 1973
items.description: An Act to establish a basic scheme of social security contributions and benefits replacing the National Insurance Acts, to assimilate to it the operation of the Industrial Injuries Acts and the Old Cases Acts; to make further provision with respect to occupational pension schemes (including schemes financed from public funds), to establish an Occupational Pensions Board with functions in respect of such schemes (including in particular functions with respect to the recognition of schemes, the preservation of benefits and the modification of schemes for the purpose of obtaining recognition and other purposes); to establish a contributory reserve pension scheme under a Reserve Pension Board providing pensions in respect of service in employment which is not recognised pensionable employment; and for purposes connected with those matters.

items.title: Statute Law (Repeals) Act 1973
Atomic Energy Authority (Weapons Group) Act 1973
items.description: An Act to transfer to the Secretary of State the Weapons Group of the United Kingdom Atomic Energy Authority, and for connected purposes; and to modify section 2 of the Atomic Energy Authority Act 1954 in respect of the Authority's power to do work on explosive nuclear devices.

items.title: Appropriation Act 1973
Fair Trading Act 1973
items.description: An Act to provide for the appointment of a Director General of Fair Trading and of a Consumer Protection Advisory Committee, and to confer on the Director General and the Committee so appointed, on the Secretary of State, on the Restrictive Practices Court and on certain other courts new functions for the protection of consumers; to make provision, in substitution for the Monopolies and Restrictive Practices (Inquiry and Control) Act 1948 and the Monopolies and Mergers Act 1965, for the matters dealt with in those Acts and related matters, including restrictive labour practices; to amend the Restrictive Trade Practices Act 1956 and the Restrictive Trade Practices Act 1968, to make provision for extending the said Act of 1956 to agreements relating to services, and to transfer to the Director General of Fair Trading the functions of the Registrar of Restrictive Trading Agreements; to make provision with respect to pyramid selling and similar trading schemes; to make new provision in place of section 30(2) to (4) of the Trade Descriptions Act 1968; and for purposes connected with those matters.

items.title: National Insurance and Supplementary Benefit Act 1973
Hallmarking Act 1973
items.description: An Act to make fresh provision for the composition, assaying, marking and description of articles of, or containing, precious metals, and as to agencies for the implementation and enforcement thereof; and for purposes connected with those matters.

items.title: Heavy Commercial Vehicles (Controls and Regulations) Act 1973
Domicile and Matrimonial Proceedings Act 1973
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to the domicile of married women and persons not of full age, to matters connected with domicile and to jurisdiction in matrimonial proceedings including actions for reduction of consistorial decrees; to make further provision about the recognition of divorces and legal separations; and for purposes connected therewith.

items.title: International Cocoa Agreement Act 1973
items.description: An Act to enable effect to be given in the United Kingdom to the International Cocoa Agreement

items.title: Protection of Aircraft Act 1973
Pakistan Act 1973
Bangladesh Act 1973
items.description: An Act to make provision in connection with the establishment of Bangladesh as an independent Republic within the Commonwealth

items.title: Housing (Amendment) Act 1973
Employment And Training Act 1973
items.description: An Act to establish public authorities concerned with arrangements for persons to obtain employment and with arrangements for training for employment and to make provision as to the functions of the authorities; to authorise the Secretary of State to provide temporary employment for unemployed persons; to amend the Industrial Training Act 1964 and the law relating to the provision by education authorities of services relating to employment; and for purposes connected with those matters.

items.title: Finance Act 1973
items.description: An Act to grant certain duties, to alter other duties, and to amend the law relating to the National Debt and the Public Revenue, and to make further provision in connection with Finance.

items.title: Prescription and Limitation (Scotland) Act 1973
items.description: An Act to replace the Prescription Acts of 1469,1474 and 1617 and make new provision in the law of Scotland with respect to the establishment and definition by positive prescription of title to interests in land and of positive servitudes and public rights of way, and with respect to the extinction of rights and obligations by negative prescription; to repeal certain enactments relating to limitation of proof; to re-enact with modifications certain enactments relating to the time-limits for bringing legal proceedings where damages are claimed which consist of or include damages or solatium in respect of personal injuries or in respect of a person's death and the time-limit for claiming contribution between wrongdoers; and for purposes connected with the matters aforesaid.

items.title: Northern Ireland (Emergency Provisions) Act 1973
items.description: An Act to make provision with respect to the following matters in Northern Ireland, that is to say, proceedings for and the punishment of certain offences, the detention of terrorists, the preservation of the peace, the maintenance of order and the detection of crime and to proscribe and make other provision in connection with certain organisations there, and for connected purposes.

items.title: Nature Conservancy Council Act 1973
items.description: An Act to establish a Nature Conservancy Council.

items.title: Statute Law Revision (Northern Ireland) Act 1973
Land Compensation (Scotland) Act 1973
items.description: An Act to re-enact in the form in which they apply to Scotland the provisions of the Land Compensation Act 1973.

items.title: Badgers Act 1973 (repealed 16.10.1992)
items.description: An Act to prohibit, save as permitted under this Act, the taking, injuring or killing of badgers.

items.title: Insurance Companies Amendment Act 1973
items.description: An Act to amend the law relating to insurance companies and the carrying on of insurance business; and to validate certain group policies.

items.title: Education (Scotland) Act 1973
Furnished Lettings (Rent Allowances) Act 1973
Breeding of Dogs Act 1973 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to regulate the commercial breeding of dogs; to provide for inspection of premises at which dogs are bred and for control over the transportation of puppies; and for purposes connected with those matters.

items.title: Pensioners’ Payments and National Insurance Act 1973
items.description: An Act to make provision for payments to pensioners; to increase the rate of certain contributions under the National Insurance Acts 1965 to 1973 and the National Insurance Acts (Northern Ireland) 1966 to 1973; to amend the provisions of the National Insurance (Industrial Injuries) Act 1965 and the National Insurance (Industrial Injuries) Act (Northern Ireland) 1966 relating to pneumoconiosis, and to make provision for facilitating the consolidation of certain enactments relating to social security; and for connected purposes.

items.title: Powers of Criminal Courts Act 1973 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to consolidate certain enactments relating to the powers of courts to deal with offenders and defaulters, to the treatment of offenders and to arrangements for persons on bail.

items.title: Government Trading Funds Act 1973
items.description: An Act to enable certain services of the Crown to be financed by means of trading funds established in pursuance of orders made by the responsible Minister with Treasury concurrence; to make consequential provision (in the event of a trading fund being established for the Mint) as to sums received by, or due from, the Treasury in respect of the coinage; and to amend the Coinage Act 1971 in respect of the establishment and operations of the Mint.

items.title: Maplin Development Act 1973
Local Government (Scotland) Act 1973
items.description: An Act to make provision with respect to local government and the functions of local authorities in Scotland; to amend Part II of the Transport Act 1968; and for connected purposes.

items.title: Channel Tunnel (Initial Finance) Act 1973 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make financial provision in relation to preliminary work on or in connection with the construction of a railway tunnel system under the English Channel.

items.title: Fuel and Electricity (Control) Act 1973
items.description: An Act to make temporary provision for controlling the production, supply, acquisition and use of certain substances and of electricity; and for purposes connected with those matters.

items.title: International Sugar Organisation Act 1973
items.description: An Act to provide for the continued application to the International Sugar Organisation of section 1 of the International Organisations Act 1968.

items.title: Northern Ireland Constitution (Amendment) Act 1973 (repealed 2.12.1999)
items.description: An Act to provide that the number of persons who may hold appointments under section 8 of the Northern Ireland Constitution Act 1973 shall be increased to fifteen of whom not more than eleven may be members of the Northern Ireland Executive appointed in accordance with this Act.

items.title: Concorde Aircraft Act 1973
Coal Industry Act 1973
items.description: An Act to provide for the capital reconstruction of the National Coal Board; to make provision with respect to borrowing by the Board or its subsidiaries, and with respect to their powers to give guarantees in connection with loans; to confer on the Secretary of State new or extended powers to make grants or other payments to the Board or to other producers of coking coal, or to or in respect of workers in the coal industry made redundant; to authorise the appointment of additional members of the Board; and for purposes connected with those matters.

items.title: Counter-Inflation Act 1973
items.description: An Act to establish a Price Commission and a Pay Board; to authorise the formulation of the principles to be applied by those bodies; to afford powers of control over prices, pay, dividends and rents; to provide for the furnishing of information about rates ; and for connected purposes.
